zh-hans.Treworgey, Duloe, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾度洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard于1400年出生在英国可瓦爾。他和Johanna Hill至少有1个女儿。他去世于1466年在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard was born in 1400, in Cornwall, England. He had at least 1 daughter with Johanna Hill. He died in 1466, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard est né en 1400, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Johanna Hill. Il est décédé en 1466, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard wurde 1400 in Cornwall, England geboren. Er hatte mit Johanna Hill mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1466 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard è nato il nel 1400 nel Cornwall, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Johanna Hill. Morì nel 1466, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.Treworgey, Duloe, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルダロ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichardは1400年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた。彼はJohanna Hillとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1466年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard(은)는 1400년 영국 코른월에서 태어났다. 그는 Johanna Hill(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard nasceu em 1400, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Johanna Hill. Ele faleceu em 1466, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard родился в 1400 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Johanna Hill. Он умер в 1466 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Fitzrichard nació en 1400, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Johanna Hill. Murió en 1466, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
